question: 📅 What did you do yesterday?
japanese: 昨日何をしましたか？

question: 🍽️ What did you have for dinner last night?
japanese: 昨晩夕食に何を食べましたか？

question: 🎮 Did you play any games yesterday?
japanese: 昨日何かゲームをしましたか？

question: 🌤️ How was the weather yesterday?
japanese: 昨日の天気はどうでしたか？

question: 📺 What TV program did you watch last night?
japanese: 昨晩どんなテレビ番組を見ましたか？

question: 📚 Did you study English yesterday?
japanese: 昨日英語を勉強しましたか？

question: 🏫 Were you at school yesterday?
japanese: 昨日学校にいましたか？

question: 👕 What clothes did you wear yesterday?
japanese: 昨日どんな服を着ましたか？

question: 🐶 Did you walk your dog yesterday?
japanese: 昨日犬を散歩させましたか？

question: 📞 Who did you talk to on the phone yesterday?
japanese: 昨日誰と電話で話しましたか？

question: 🚗 Where did you go last weekend?
japanese: 先週末どこへ行きましたか？

question: 🎁 Did you get any presents last month?
japanese: 先月プレゼントをもらいましたか？

question: 🍕 What did you eat for lunch yesterday?
japanese: 昨日昼食に何を食べましたか？

question: 🏃 Did you exercise yesterday?
japanese: 昨日運動しましたか？

question: 🛌 What time did you go to bed last night?
japanese: 昨晩何時に寝ましたか？

question: ⏰ What time did you get up this morning?
japanese: 今朝何時に起きましたか？

question: 🚲 Did you ride your bicycle yesterday?
japanese: 昨日自転車に乗りましたか？

question: 🛒 What did you buy last week?
japanese: 先週何を買いましたか？

question: 📖 What book did you read last month?
japanese: 先月どんな本を読みましたか？

question: 🎵 What music did you listen to yesterday?
japanese: 昨日どんな音楽を聴きましたか？

question: 🧹 Did you clean your room yesterday?
japanese: 昨日部屋を掃除しましたか？

question: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Did you see your family yesterday?
japanese: 昨日家族に会いましたか？

question: 🌧️ Was it rainy last week?
japanese: 先週雨が降りましたか？

question: 🍎 Did you eat any fruit yesterday?
japanese: 昨日果物を食べましたか？

question: 🛁 Did you take a bath last night?
japanese: 昨晩風呂に入りましたか？

question: ✈️ Where will you go next summer?
japanese: 来年夏どこへ行きますか？

question: 🎂 What will you do for your birthday?
japanese: 誕生日に何をしますか？

question: 🎓 Will you go to university after school?
japanese: 学校の後大学へ行きますか？

question: 📚 Will you study English tomorrow?
japanese: 明日英語を勉強しますか？

question: 🛒 What will you buy next weekend?
japanese: 来週末何を買いますか？

question: 👕 What will you wear tomorrow?
japanese: 明日どんな服を着ますか？

question: 🍽️ What will you eat for dinner tonight?
japanese: 今晩夕食に何を食べますか？

question: 📺 What TV program will you watch tonight?
japanese: 今晩どんなテレビ番組を見ますか？

question: 🎮 Will you play games this weekend?
japanese: 今週末ゲームをしますか？

question: 🐶 Will you walk your dog tomorrow?
japanese: 明日犬を散歩させますか？

question: 🏃 Will you exercise tomorrow?
japanese: 明日運動しますか？

question: 📞 Who will you call on the phone tonight?
japanese: 今晩誰に電話をしますか？

question: 📖 What book will you read next?
japanese: 次にどんな本を読みますか？

question: 🎵 What music will you listen to tomorrow?
japanese: 明日どんな音楽を聴きますか？

question: 👫 Will you meet friends this weekend?
japanese: 今週末友達に会いますか？

question: 🍎 Which is bigger, an apple or an orange?
japanese: りんごとオレンジ、どちらが大きいですか？

question: 🏫 Which is closer, your home or your school?
japanese: 家と学校、どちらが近いですか？

question: 🍚 Which do you like better, rice or bread?
japanese: ご飯とパン、どちらが好きですか？

question: 🐱 Which is faster, a cat or a dog?
japanese: 猫と犬、どちらが速いですか？

question: 🎵 Which is louder, rock music or classical?
japanese: ロック音楽とクラシック、どちらがうるさいですか？

question: 🌡️ Which season is warmer, spring or autumn?
japanese: 春と秋、どちらが暖かいですか？

question: 🎮 Which is more fun, video games or sports?
japanese: ビデオゲームとスポーツ、どちらが楽しいですか？

question: 📺 Which is more interesting, TV or books?
japanese: テレビと本、どちらが面白いですか？

question: 🏠 Which is bigger, your house or your school?
japanese: 家と学校、どちらが大きいですか？
